seoTitle: Connolly vs Coodanup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Connolly and Coodanup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Connolly and Coodanup.
heading: Connolly vs Coodanup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Connolly, Western Australia and Coodanup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Connolly has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Coodanup (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Connolly or Coodanup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Connolly has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Coodanup scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Connolly scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Coodanup scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Connolly or Coodanup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Connolly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
